arts.ttl: Champions League | Inter v RB Leipzig: Match Prediction, Preview, Team News and Lineups
arts.sum: In a highly anticipated Champions League encounter, Inter Milan will host RB Leipzig at the iconic San Siro on Tuesday evening. The match presents a stark contrast in fortunes, with Inter enjoying an unbeaten run in the competition while Leipzig struggle to find their footing. Inter Milan have been in impressive form, kicking off their campaign with a resilient 0-0 draw against Manchester City. They’ve since secured victories over Red Star Belgrade, Young Boys, and Arsenal, maintaining a perfect defensive record with no goals conceded. arts.ttl: Dimarco on Inter’s progress ahead of Leipzig match: “We need to set aside last season”
arts.sum: As Inter Milan prepare to return to UEFA Champions League action, Federico Dimarco addressed the media alongside coach Simone Inzaghi ahead of their fifth match against RB Leipzig at San Siro. The Nerazzurri remain unbeaten in the competition, having secured 10 points so far, while Leipzig has yet to earn a point. Discussing the importance of the upcoming match, Dimarco stated, “We need to deliver a great performance against a strong team. The Champions League is one of the most beautiful competitions; it provides great motivation. arts.ttl: Leipzig rues another defeat before tackling winless start to Champions League
arts.sum: The energy drink-backed team squandered a lead three times and lost 4-3 at Hoffenheim in the Bundesliga on Saturday, losing to a side that hadn’t won any of its previous three games. “I’ll have to take the blame as coach if I don’t manage to give my team enough fire, courage and passion before a Bundesliga game to take it on the field,” Rose said.
